- Bring way more water than you think you need, layers (it's cold/windy up top even in warm weather), sun protection, and real hiking shoes.

Have a great hike! And hey — nothing's stopping you from saving the cigars for the summit. 🚬⛰️

- Most legit studios (Vivid, Kink, etc.) don't offer walk-up tours — you'll likely need to book in advance, and some only do industry/press visits. Worth calling ahead before you drive out to the Valley.
- If the coin's pick falls through, Option 2 is a great backup — just note Mulholland has tight blind curves, residential speed enforcement, and rental Lambos often come with strict mileage/geofencing rules. Mulholland Highway out by the canyons (west of the 101) is the more fun, open stretch most drivers actually want.

Enjoy LA! 🌴
